seoTitle: Leonora vs Lesley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Leonora and Lesley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Leonora and Lesley.
heading: Leonora vs Lesley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Leonora, Western Australia and Lesley, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Leonora has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Lesley (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Leonora or Lesley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Leonora has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Lesley scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Leonora scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Lesley scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Leonora or Lesley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Leonora has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
